# Destructor Cloak
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Destructor%20Cloak&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Destructor Cloak
| desc = There is only 1 copy of this cloak... And you o... Well, there might be 2.
| slot = cloak
| tier = UT
| rarity = h

| cost = 125
| cooldown = 8.5
| feedp = 500
| fameb = 6

| bonuses = {{Stat|def|2}} {{Stat|vit|2}}

| effects = yes
| invisible = 6
| berserk = 2
| damaging = 2

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped in: Abyss of Demons.
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavCloaks}}
[[Category:Cloaks]]
</noinclude>
